{{Quote|You're cleared for Circle 15 at the Rintatta City military landing field. Coordinates are being sent to you now.|[[Trey David]]|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Rintatta City''' was a major city of the planet [[Exocron]]. [[Talon Karrde]] and his group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] landed at [[Circle 15]] in the Rintatta City military landing fields when going to Exocron to visit [[Jorj Car'das]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
